title: Spicy Juicy Ukrainian Pork Skewers
description: These skewers bring together the bold flavors of Ukraine, with spicy pork, sour dill pickles, and a hint of freshness from parsley, all while being Whole30-friendly. Perfect for a summer evening, they are sure to impress your guests.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together smoked paprika, black pepper, salt, and red pepper flakes.
Add the chopped garlic, lemon juice, and olive oil to the bowl and mix until well combined.
Add the pork cubes to the marinade and toss to coat. Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight.
Preheat a grill to medium-high heat. Thread the marinated pork cubes onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Grill the skewers for 10-12 minutes, turning occasionally, until the pork is cooked through and slightly charred.
While the pork is cooking, mix the chopped dill pickles and parsley in a small bowl.
Once the pork skewers are done, brush them with the pickle-parsley mixture.
Serve the skewers hot, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
Let the skewers rest for a few minutes before serving to allow the juices to redistribute.
